question: How do I request a deadline extension?
final_answer: To request a deadline extension, email your instructor at least 24 hours before the original deadline with the subject line "[EXTENSION REQUEST] <Course> <Assignment Name]." Briefly describe the reason for the request and attach any relevant documentation. If approved, you will receive a confirmation email with the new deadline, which is typically 48-72 hours beyond the original deadline.
